summary: Tested Monthly Target Tracking feature for MIS Dashboard. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Targets CRUD working correctly with role-based access control. Leaderboard shows target progress with color-coded progress bars.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/targets - Admin can create target
Backend: POST /api/targets - Manager can create target
Backend: POST /api/targets - Agent gets 403 (correctly denied)
Backend: POST /api/targets - Upsert behavior (update existing target)
Backend: GET /api/targets - Returns all targets
Backend: GET /api/targets?month=04-2026 - Filters by month
Backend: Target has required fields (agent_name, month, target_amount)
Backend: DELETE /api/targets/{agent_name}/{month} - Admin can delete
Backend: DELETE /api/targets/{agent_name}/{month} - Manager can delete
Backend: DELETE /api/targets/{agent_name}/{month} - Agent gets 403
Backend: GET /api/analytics/team-leaderboard - Returns target_amount and target_progress fields
Backend: Leaderboard with month filter works
Backend: Target progress calculation correct (disbursed_amount / target_amount * 100)
Backend: Leaderboard has all required fields including target fields
Backend: Target creation requires agent_name (400 if missing)
Backend: Target creation requires month (400 if missing)
Backend: Target amount defaults to 0 if not provided
UI: Dashboard leaderboard shows 'Target Progress' column
UI: Progress bar shows GREEN (bg-emerald-500) for >=100%
UI: Progress bar shows AMBER (bg-amber-400) for >=60%
UI: Progress bar shows RED (bg-red-400) for <60%
UI: 'No target set' text shown for agents without targets
UI: 'Set Targets' button visible for admin
UI: 'Set Targets' button visible for manager
UI: Set Targets dialog opens with month input and agent rows
UI: Set Targets dialog shows current disbursement for each agent
UI: Target amount inputs work correctly
UI: Save Targets button saves and updates leaderboard
UI: Agent cannot see Team Performance Leaderboard (correctly hidden)

backend_apis.POST /api/targets: Creates or updates target for agent_name+month (upsert)
backend_apis.GET /api/targets: Returns all targets, optional month filter

role_based_access.agent: Cannot set/delete targets (403), cannot see leaderboard

Dashboard.jsx.leaderboard_table: Shows Target Progress column with progress bars
Dashboard.jsx.no_target_text: 'No target set' shown when target_amount is 0

features_verified.target_progress_calculation: disbursed_amount / target_amount * 100, capped at 100% width for bar

context_for_next_testing_agent: Monthly Target Tracking feature fully tested and working. Targets stored in 'agent_targets' collection with fields: id, agent_name, month, target_amount, created_by, created_at. Leaderboard endpoint merges targets with agent stats. Progress bar colors: green (>=100%), amber (>=60%), red (<60%). Role-based access: only admin/manager can set/delete targets. All data-testid attributes working correctly for testing.
